title: Challenge
description: Challenge message sent by the station to the app via BLE characteristic FFF4 (Notify). Part of the authentication handshake, provides the station nonce and connectivity status.

stationNonce.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte cryptographically random nonce (exactly 44 Base64 characters; N16 — was minLength:1).

stationCert.description: Server-signed StationIdentity certificate (06-security.md §6.5.2). The app MUST verify its ECDSA signature and expiry BEFORE sending any OfflinePass. Its stationPubKey is the station's static BLE ECDH key used in es = ECDH(appEphemeral, stationStaticPub).

stationEphemeralPubKey.description: The station's per-handshake ephemeral P-256 public key (compressed SEC1, Base64). Provides forward secrecy via ee = ECDH(appEphemeral, stationEphemeral). Freshly generated per handshake.

stationConnectivity.description: Current network connectivity status of the station

availableServices.description: Optional snapshot of service availability included with the challenge

available.description: Whether this service is currently available
